decisionRules.ENGINE_BUY: calibrated edge >= 7%, calibratedDecision=vvs_buy, no major context warnings
decisionRules.MANUAL_REVIEW: calibrated edge >= 3% but context warnings or smaller grade
decisionRules.WATCH: calibrated edge < 3% or weak post-calibration signal

principles: Raw model probability is never used for final edge.
Pitcher, bullpen, lineup, and weather are context gates, not model weights yet.
Edge ledger must prove live results before risk escalation.
